tipRules.tip: Wheeler: The Punch Out Craw can be modified without tools: leave intact for a glide bait (punching mats), separate claws for a flipping version, remove the spear tail for a flapping craw, or twist off the body to make a jig trailer chunk.
Wheeler: When the bite is tough, use the finesse version (body and tail only) - especially effective when grass shrimp are present.

knowledge.insight: Wheeler: Designed the Punch Out Craw with score lines for tool-free modification into 5 versions: glide (punching), flipping (separated claws), flapping craw (removed spear tail), chunk (jig trailer), and finesse (body and tail only). Full body takes a 4/0 hook; twist off the end segment for a 3/0 hook.
